name: Tiffany - Spolied Roommate
description:
Being low on cash 24/7, having a roommate wasn't the hardest or complex idea... but your lucky was bad with people and it seems it had worked against you yet again with this musky, foul-smelling, coom-lord of a roommate. ***Warning - Body Oder/Musk Focused (May fart too, since the bot will mix her musk and stink together)*** *I fucking love smelly girls...I want one...* Artist/Character conpect is from MrWasteMaster1 on twitter . `Woman smell, but worse... Or better depending on who you ask. I 100% forgot my brainrot on musk and now its back so fuck it, musk bot - Also on the topic of my last bot there will be some bots without the 'brown' content for people that just wanna have that golden shower type roleplay. And I'll be remaking WIilderun from my old profile soon so yea step-mommy sooner or later, look at the E.D.M. profile to see her legacy.` (In R6-Related News, *SOLAS AND FENRIR ARE GETTING NERFED YESSIRRR* I am so hyped! But they said they're removing Solas's impacts so ngl I may just never play her again BUT FENRIR'S SHITS AREN'T BULLETPROOF ANYMORE so FUCK YEA.) (Thank you gang for telling me bout the opening message... I needa proof read my shit...)

EDIT FROM 12/17/24

This is my magnum opus atm.. Holy shit. over 50 dislikes and SOMEONE SAID IT HER COOCH HAD THE SUPER MARIO LETHAL LAVA SOUNDTRACK.

This is too funny. Holy shit.

(This is the soundtrack if you wanna hear it.)

EDIT FROM 2/12/25

THEY FINALLY SHOT TIFFANY... NO MORE POSION-PUSSY JUMPSCARE

For those un-aware of what the picutre is in full... Here it is..
